architectural_features.shape: Massive horseshoe/parabolic arch, open at both short ends

glass_facades.description: Pre-stressed steel cables form net from which glass panes hang

interior_mural.name: Horn of Plenty (Hoorn des Overvloeds)
interior_mural.description: Enlarged flowers, fruits, vegetables, fish, insects on perforated aluminium panels
interior_mural.style: References Dutch Golden Age still-life paintings

colors.glass_ends: Clear glass with steel cable grid

block_palette.glass_ends: Glass panes with iron bars for cable net
block_palette.interior_mural: Colored terracotta, glazed terracotta for artwork

minecraft_suggestions.build_notes: Semicircular arch cross-section: radius ~20 blocks (height) spanning ~46 blocks (interior width) at 1:1 scale.
